title: pavonia lanata
intro: Pavonia lanata, also known as Desert Rose, is a flowering plant species belonging to the family Malvaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Pavonia lanata include reducing fever, soothing skin irritations, and treating respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. The plant is often used in herbal preparations like teas, infusions, and topical creams, making it a popular remedy in traditional medicine.
